title: Ash: action stop
description: An Ash Framework action span completed. Emitted by Honeybadger.Insights.Ash when the span type is included in trace_types config. Default trace_types: [:custom, :action].

span_id.description: Unique ID for this span, for correlating nested spans.

name.description: Span name, typically the action or operation name.

parent_span_id.description: ID of the parent span, enabling operation tree reconstruction.

error.description: Present if the span captured an error via set_error/2.

request_id.description: Request ID from the current EventContext.
